knowledge_hooks.hook: Use True Breakfast when a smaller F&B operator is still using manual schedules; fewer duplicate shifts plus easier attendance visibility is the Knowledge point.
knowledge_hooks.pain: Manual scheduling created duplicate-shift risk and made attendance harder to monitor remotely.
knowledge_hooks.outcome: StaffAny made scheduling faster and attendance easier to monitor, including late/no-arrival visibility.
knowledge_hooks.best_fit_prospect_pattern: SG small/mid F&B operators with manual scheduling, duplicate shifts, and attendance visibility pain.
